message:
refactor: use binary + zlib compression for file transfer

- Replace JSON + base64 with binary protocol
- Upload: [0x10][panel_id:u32][name_len:u16][name][zlib_data]
- Download request: [0x11][panel_id:u32][path_len:u16][path]
- Download response: [0x12][name_len:u16][name][zlib_data]
- Error: [0x13][error_len:u16][error]
- ~33% savings from no base64, plus zlib compression
- Use pako (client) and libdeflate (server) for zlib
